<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/libs/gui/DisplayEventDispatcher.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventDispatcher</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">scheduleVsync</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mWaitingForVsync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;dispatcher %p ~ Scheduling vsync.&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="k">this</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Drain all pending events.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">vsyncTimestamp</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">PhysicalDisplayId</span> <span class="n">vsyncDisplayId</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span> <span class="n">vsyncCount</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">VsyncEventData</span> <span class="n">vsyncEventData</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">processPendingEvents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">vsyncTimestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">vsyncDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">vsyncCount</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">vsyncEventData</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;dispatcher %p ~ last event processed while scheduling was for %&#34;</span> <span class="n">PRId64</span> <span class="s">&#34;&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="k">this</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ns2ms</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vsyncTimestamp</span><span class="p">)));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mReceiver</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">requestNextVsync</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Failed to request next vsync, status=%d&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mWaitingForVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mLastScheduleVsyncTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">systemTime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SYSTEM_TIME_MONOTONIC</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">OK</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span><span class="err">```</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err">调用</span><span class="n">processPendingEvents方法</span><span class="err">：</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err">```</span><span class="n">cpp</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/libs/gui/DisplayEventDispatcher.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventDispatcher</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">processPendingEvents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outTimestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">PhysicalDisplayId</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">uint32_t</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outCount</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">VsyncEventData</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">outVsyncEventData</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">gotVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span> <span class="n">buf</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EVENT_BUFFER_SIZE</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">n</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">((</span><span class="n">n</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mReceiver</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">getEvents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">buf</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EVENT_BUFFER_SIZE</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;dispatcher %p ~ Read %d events.&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="k">this</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">int</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">n</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mFrameRateOverrides</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">reserve</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">n</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">n</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">ev</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">buf</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">switch</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_VSYNC</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Later vsync events will just overwrite the info from earlier
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// ones. That&#39;s fine, we only care about the most recent.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">gotVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outTimestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outDisplayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outCount</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">outVsyncEventData</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_HOTPLUG</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchHotplug</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">hotplug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connected</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_MODE_CHANGE</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchModeChanged</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">modeChange</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">modeId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">modeChange</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_NULL</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchNullEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_FRAME_RATE_OVERRIDE</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mFrameRateOverrides</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">frameRateOverride</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_FRAME_RATE_OVERRIDE_FLUSH</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchFrameRateOverrides</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mFrameRateOverrides</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">default</span><span class="o">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;dispatcher %p ~ ignoring unknown event type %#x&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="k">this</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ev</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">n</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Failed to get events from display event dispatcher, status=%d&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">status_t</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">n</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">gotVsync</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>

item.title: Android13 EventThread threadMain流程分析_eventthread::threadmain-CSDN博客
item.author: huang8604@163.com (wentao)
item.description:
<p>EventThread的threadMain方法无限循环处理pendingEvents,对Vsync类型的Event分发到消费者，通过往消费者的FD写数据，通知APP有Vsync信号到来。pendingEvents中的消息处理完了，分发线程等待mCondition的通知，EventThread的threadMain方法代码如下：</p>

<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/EventThread.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">vector</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">threadMain</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_lock</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// consumers 表示即将消费事件的 connection 集合
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">DisplayEventConsumers</span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 状态值不等于 State::Quit 则一直循环遍历，死循环
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Quit</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">optional</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Determine next event to dispatch.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 确定下一个要调度的 Event
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">event</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">front</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="c1">// 获取头部 Event
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">pop_front</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="c1">// 将头部 Event 弹出
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">switch</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="c1">// 根据 Event 类型分别对应处理
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_HOTPLUG</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="c1">//Event类型为DISPLAY_EVENT_HOTPLUG，即当显示设备（如显示器）被插入或拔出时产生
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">hotplug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connected</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">hotplug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connected</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">reset</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_EVENT_VSYNC</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="c1">//Event类型为DISPLAY_EVENT_VSYNC，即Vsync（ 垂直同步）事件
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mInterceptVSyncsCallback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mInterceptVSyncsCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 标志位：是否有 VSync 请求，默认 false
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">vsyncRequested</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Find connections that should consume this event.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 循环遍历存储 EventThreadConnection 的 vector 容器 mDisplayEventConnections，查找要消费事件的连接
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// begin()函数用于返回指向向量容器的第一个元素的迭代器
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">it</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mDisplayEventConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">begin</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">it</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">mDisplayEventConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">connection</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">it</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">promote</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="c1">// promote 下面引用有介绍
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 如果有一个 connection 的 vsyncRequest 不为 None 则 vsyncRequested 为 true
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">vsyncRequested</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">connection</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">vsyncRequest</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">VSyncRequest</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">None</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// event 不为空且 shouldConsumeEvent() 返回 true 则将 connection 加入到 consumers 等待消费 event
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// shouldConsumeEvent() 方法作用：对于 VSync 类型的事件，只要 VSyncRequest 的类型不是 None 就返回 true
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">shouldConsumeEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">it</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 获取不到 connection 则从 mDisplayEventConnections 移除
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">it</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mDisplayEventConnections</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">it</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// consumers 不为空即当前 Event 有 EventThreadConnection 来消费
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">empty</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 分发完清空
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">clear</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">State</span> <span class="n">nextState</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">vsyncRequested</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="c1">// 有 VSync 请求
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 调用 dispatchEvent() 方法遍历 consumers 为其每个 EventThreadConnection 分发事件
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">nextState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">synthetic</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">SyntheticVSync</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Ignoring VSYNC request while display is disconnected&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 显示器熄屏或没有连接、忽略 VSync 请求
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">nextState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Idle</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// mState 值默认为 State::Idle，与 nextState 不一致，则分情况讨论
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">nextState</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 当前状态为 State::VSync，则调用 mVSyncSource 的 setVSyncEnabled 并传入 false
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setVSyncEnabled</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nextState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// nextState 状态为 State::VSync，则调用 mVSyncSource 的 setVSyncEnabled 并传入 true
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setVSyncEnabled</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nextState</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span> <span class="c1">// 还有事件则继续循环遍历
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">continue</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Wait for event or client registration/request.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 没有事件且当前状态为：State::Idle，则线程继续等待事件或客户端注册/请求
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Idle</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCondition</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">wait</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Generate a fake VSYNC after a long timeout in case the driver stalls. When the
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// display is off, keep feeding clients at 60 Hz.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">timeout</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">SyntheticVSync</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="mi">16</span><span class="nl">ms</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">1000</span><span class="n">ms</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCondition</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">wait_for</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">cv_status</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mState</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">State</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSync</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Faking VSYNC due to driver stall for thread %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mThreadName</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">string</span> <span class="n">debugInfo</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s">&#34;VsyncSource debug info:</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s">&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">debugInfo</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Log the debug info line-by-line to avoid logcat overflow
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">debugInfo</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sc">&#39;\n&#39;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">string</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">npos</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;%s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">debugInfo</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">substr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">debugInfo</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">debugInfo</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">substr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">debugInfo</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">find</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sc">&#39;\n&#39;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">now</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">systemTime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SYSTEM_TIME_MONOTONIC</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">now</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTime</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">timeout</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 将伪造的 VSync 放入 mPendingEvents 准备分发
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">makeVSync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">now</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="eventthread-dispatchevent" class="heading-element"><span>EventThread dispatchEvent</span>
 <a href="#eventthread-dispatchevent" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>调用EventThread的dispatchEvent方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/EventThread.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">dispatchEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventConsumers</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 循环获取 DisplayEventConsumers 中保存每个 EventThreadConnection
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="nl">consumer</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">consumers</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span> <span class="n">copy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DISPLAY_EVENT_VSYNC</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 获取 VSync 信号周期即：帧间隔
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">int64_t</span> <span class="n">frameInterval</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mGetVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">consumer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">mOwnerUid</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">copy</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">frameInterval</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">frameInterval</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">generateFrameTimeline</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copy</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">frameInterval</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">copy</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">preferredExpectedPresentationTime</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsync</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">preferredDeadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">switch</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">consumer</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">postEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">copy</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="nl">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">case</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="nl">EAGAIN</span><span class="p">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// TODO: Try again if pipe is full.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Failed dispatching %s for %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">toString</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">toString</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">consumer</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">break</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">default</span><span class="o">:</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Treat EPIPE and other errors as fatal.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">removeDisplayEventConnectionLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">consumer</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="eventthreadconnection-postevent" class="heading-element"><span>EventThreadConnection postEvent</span>
 <a href="#eventthreadconnection-postevent" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>分发之调用的consumer-&gt;postEvent(copy)，这个consumer就是上面加入的EventThreadConnection对象。它的postEvent如下：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/EventThread.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">status_t</span> <span class="n">EventThreadConnection</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">postEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Event</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">toStatus</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[](</span><span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">status_t</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">status_t</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DISPLAY_EVENT_FRAME_RATE_OVERRIDE</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DISPLAY_EVENT_FRAME_RATE_OVERRIDE_FLUSH</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">header</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DISPLAY_EVENT_FRAME_RATE_OVERRIDE</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nf">status_t</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sendEvents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">mChannel</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">data</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">clear</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nf">toStatus</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sendEvents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">mChannel</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nf">toStatus</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="displayeventreceiver-sendevents" class="heading-element"><span>DisplayEventReceiver sendEvents</span>
 <a href="#displayeventreceiver-sendevents" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>mChannel 的类型是BitTube，保存的是EventThreadConnection中记录的文件描述符,这个文件描述符会复制到连接过来的app进程.然后调用DisplayEventReceiver::sendEvents(&amp;mChannel, &amp;event, 1)方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/libs/gui/DisplayEventReceiver.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">DisplayEventReceiver</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sendEvents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">gui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">BitTube</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">dataChannel</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">Event</span> <span class="k">const</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">events</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">count</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">gui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">BitTube</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sendObjects</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">dataChannel</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">events</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">count</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h5 id="bittube-sendobjects" class="heading-element"><span>BitTube sendObjects</span>
 <a href="#bittube-sendobjects" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>调用BitTube调用sendObjects方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/libs/gui/BitTube.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">BitTube</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sendObjects</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BitTube</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">tube</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="k">const</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">events</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">count</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">objSize</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">char</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">vaddr</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">reinterpret_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">char</span><span class="o">*&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">events</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 调用 BitTube 的 write() 方法来写入数据
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tube</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vaddr</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">objSize</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// should never happen because of SOCK_SEQPACKET
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">%</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ssize_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">objSize</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;BitTube::sendObjects(count=%zu, size=%zu), res=%zd (partial events were &#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;sent!)&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">count</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">objSize</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// ALOGE_IF(size&lt;0, &#34;error %d sending %d events&#34;, size, count);
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="nl">size</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">size</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ssize_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">objSize</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用BitTube的write方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/libs/gui/BitTube.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">BitTube</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="k">const</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">vaddr</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">err</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">len</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">do</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 通过文件描述符 mSendFd 关联的 socket 管道将数据发送到 vaddr 指定的一段
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// size 大小的缓冲区中，并返回实际发送的数据大小：len
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">len</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">::</span><span class="n">send</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSendFd</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">vaddr</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">size</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">MSG_DONTWAIT</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">MSG_NOSIGNAL</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// cannot return less than size, since we&#39;re using SOCK_SEQPACKET
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">err</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">len</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="nl">errno</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">err</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">EINTR</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">err</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="nl">len</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="n">err</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>通过调用系统函数send向与消费者关联的文件描述符FD发送信号，于是完成Vsync的分发，分发的消息在Choreographer的postCallback方法中处理：</p>
<p><a href="https://huang8604.github.io/Android13%20Choreographer%20postCallback%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B%E5%88%86%E6%9E%90-CSDN%E5%8D%9A%E5%AE%A2">Android13 Choreographer postCallback流程分析-CSDN博客</a></p>

item.title: Android13 SurfaceFlinger onComposerHalVsync流程分析-CSDN博客
item.author: huang8604@163.com (wentao)
item.description:
<p>onComposerHalVsync是一个Android系统中的一个回调函数，用于在垂直同步（Vsync）事件发生时通知应用程序。Vsync是指显示器刷新的时间点，它通常以固定的频率发生，比如60Hz。应用程序可以通过注册onComposerHalVsync回调函数来获取Vsync事件的通知。</p>
<p>当Vsync事件发生时，系统会调用注册了onComposerHalVsync回调函数的应用程序，并传递一个时间戳参数，表示Vsync事件发生的时间点。应用程序可以利用这个时间戳来进行一些与显示相关的操作，比如更新UI界面或者进行动画效果的计算。</p>
<p>onComposerHalVsync函数通常是在底层硬件抽象层（HAL）中实现的，它与具体的硬件设备相关。应用程序可以通过调用系统提供的API来注册和取消onComposerHalVsync回调函数。</p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger的onComposerHalVsync方法代码如下：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span><span class="lnt">36
</span><span class="lnt">37
</span><span class="lnt">38
</span><span class="lnt">39
</span><span class="lnt">40
</span><span class="lnt">41
</span><span class="lnt">42
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onComposerHalVsync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hal</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">HWDisplayId</span> <span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">int64_t</span> <span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">optional</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">hal</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VsyncPeriodNanos</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">string</span> <span class="n">tracePeriod</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">]()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ATRACE_ENABLED</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">stringstream</span> <span class="n">ss</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ss</span> <span class="o">&lt;&lt;</span> <span class="s">&#34;(&#34;</span> <span class="o">&lt;&lt;</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span> <span class="o">&lt;&lt;</span> <span class="s">&#34;)&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ss</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">str</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">string</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ATRACE_FORMAT</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;onComposerHalVsync%s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">tracePeriod</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">Mutex</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Autolock</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mStateLock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">toPhysicalDisplayId</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getPhysicalDisplayTokenLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getDisplayDeviceLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onVsync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">onVsync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">isActiveDisplay</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">getPhysicalDisplayTokenLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">mActiveDisplayToken</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isActiveDisplay</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// For now, we don&#39;t do anything with non active display vsyncs.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">periodFlushed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
