</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">addResyncSample</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">periodFlushed</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">periodFlushed</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">modulateVsync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">VsyncModulator</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onRefreshRateChangeCompleted</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用modulateVsync方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/SurfaceFlinger.h
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">SurfaceFlinger</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">BnSurfaceComposer</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">PriorityDumper</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DeathRecipient</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">HWC2</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ComposerCallback</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">ICompositor</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ISchedulerCallback</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">BufferCountTracker</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">modulateVsync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Handler</span> <span class="n">handler</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Args</span><span class="p">...</span> <span class="n">args</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mVsyncModulator</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">handler</span><span class="p">)(</span><span class="n">args</span><span class="p">...))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFromRefreshRateConfigs</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">setVsyncConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用setVsyncConfig方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/SurfaceFlinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setVsyncConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">VsyncModulator</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VsyncConfig</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">config</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mAppConnectionHandle</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*workDuration=*/</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">appWorkDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*readyDuration=*/</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sfWorkDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSfConnectionHandle</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*workDuration=*/</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*readyDuration=*/</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sfWorkDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sfWorkDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="scheduler-setduration" class="heading-element"><span>Scheduler setDuration</span>
 <a href="#scheduler-setduration" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>调用Scheduler的setDuration方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/Scheduler.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ConnectionHandle</span> <span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="kr">thread</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mConnectionsLock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">RETURN_IF_INVALID_HANDLE</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">thread</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mConnections</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">handle</span><span class="p">].</span><span class="kr">thread</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kr">thread</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="eventthread-setduration" class="heading-element"><span>EventThread setDuration</span>
 <a href="#eventthread-setduration" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>调用EventThread的setDuration方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/EventThread.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VSyncSource</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span> <span class="n">GUARDED_BY</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用mVSyncSource(VSyncSource)的setDuration方法，DispSyncSource继承VSyncSource，调用DispSyncSource的setDuration方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/DispSyncSource.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">DispSyncSource</span> <span class="k">final</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">VSyncSource</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">DispSyncSource</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setDuration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVsyncMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mWorkDuration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mReadyDuration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// If we&#39;re not enabled, we don&#39;t need to mess with the listeners
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mEnabled</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCallbackRepeater</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mWorkDuration</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mReadyDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>mCallbackRepeater的mRegistration绑定的是DispSyncSource::onVsyncCallback，因此start方法最后会执行这个onVsyncCallback：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/DispSyncSource.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">DispSyncSource</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">vsyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">targetWakeupTime</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">readyTime</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">VSyncSource</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Callback</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">callback</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCallbackMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">callback</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCallback</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callback</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">callback</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onVSyncEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">targetWakeupTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">vsyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">readyTime</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="eventthread-onvsyncevent" class="heading-element"><span>EventThread onVSyncEvent</span>
 <a href="#eventthread-onvsyncevent" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>进而执行到DispSyncSource.mCallback.onVSyncEvent方法，而DispSyncSource.mCallback的callback实质是EventThread,所以回调将进入到EventThread.onVSyncEvent方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/EventThread.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">onVSyncEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">VSyncSource</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">VSyncData</span> <span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">push_back</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">makeVSync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">++</span><span class="n">mVSyncState</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">expectedPresentationTime</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">vsyncData</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCondition</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">notify_all</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h5 id="eventthread-threadmain" class="heading-element"><span>EventThread threadMain</span>
 <a href="#eventthread-threadmain" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>这里我们可以看到，调用了makeVSync生成一个Event并加入到mPendingEvents后面，然后调用mCondition.notify_all()，通知等待的线程，继续执行Event的分发方法threadMain：</p>
<p><a href="https://huang8604.github.io/Android13%20EventThread%20threadMain%E6%B5%81%E7%A8%8B%E5%88%86%E6%9E%90-CSDN%E5%8D%9A%E5%AE%A2">Android13 EventThread threadMain流程分析-CSDN博客</a></p>

item.title: Android13 SurfaceFlinger启动流程分析-CSDN博客
item.author: huang8604@163.com (wentao)
item.description:
<p>在Android13版本中，SurfaceFlinger是由Android.bp去启动init.rc文件，然后再解析文件去加载SurfaceFlinger。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1

</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cobol" data-lang="cobol"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c">//fram</span><span class="nv">eworks</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="kp">native</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">services</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">surfaceflinger</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">rc</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c">servic</span><span class="nv">e</span> <span class="nv">surfaceflinger</span> <span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">system</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">bin</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">surfaceflinger</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> cl</span><span class="nv">ass</span> <span class="nv">core</span> <span class="nv">animation</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> us</span><span class="nv">er</span> <span class="nv">system</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> gr</span><span class="nv">oup</span> <span class="nv">graphics</span> <span class="nv">drmrpc</span> <span class="nv">readproc</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> ca</span><span class="nv">pabilities</span> <span class="nv">SYS_NICE</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> on</span><span class="nv">restart</span> <span class="nv">restart</span> <span class="o">--</span><span class="nv">only-if-running</span> <span class="nv">zygote</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> ta</span><span class="nv">sk_profiles</span> <span class="nv">HighPerformance</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> so</span><span class="nv">cket</span> <span class="nv">pdx</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">system</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">vr</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="kr">display</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">client</span> <span class="nv">stream</span> <span class="mi">0666 </span><span class="nv">system</span> <span class="nv">graphics</span> <span class="nv">u</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">object_r</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">pdx_display_client_endpoint_socket</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">s0</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> so</span><span class="nv">cket</span> <span class="nv">pdx</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">system</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">vr</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="kr">display</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">manager</span> <span class="nv">stream</span> <span class="mi">0666 </span><span class="nv">system</span> <span class="nv">graphics</span> <span class="nv">u</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">object_r</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">pdx_display_manager_endpoint_socket</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">s0</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> so</span><span class="nv">cket</span> <span class="nv">pdx</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">system</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">vr</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="kr">display</span><span class="o">/</span><span class="nv">vsync</span> <span class="nv">stream</span> <span class="mi">0666 </span><span class="nv">system</span> <span class="nv">graphics</span> <span class="nv">u</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">object_r</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">pdx_display_vsync_endpoint_socket</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">s0</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span> <span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span> <span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c">on pro</span><span class="nv">perty</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">vendor</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">debug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">sf</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">restart</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="mi"> </span><span class="nv">restart</span> <span class="nv">surfaceflinger</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span> <span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span> <span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c">on pro</span><span class="nv">perty</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">init</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">svc</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">zygote</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nv">restarting</span> <span class="p">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="err">property</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="nv">debug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">sf</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">toomanylayers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="mi"> </span><span class="nv">restart</span> <span class="nv">surfaceflinger</span><span class="err">
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err"></span><span class="c"> s</span><span class="nv">etprop</span> <span class="nv">debug</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">sf</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="nv">toomanylayers</span> <span class="s2">&#34;0&#34;</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfacefilinger/main_SurfaceFlinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">int</span> <span class="nf">main</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">char</span><span class="o">**</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">signal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SIGPIPE</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SIG_IGN</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">hardware</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">configureRpcThreadpool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">1</span> <span class="cm">/* maxThreads */</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="nb">false</span> <span class="cm">/* callerWillJoin */</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">startGraphicsAllocatorService</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// When SF is launched in its own process, limit the number of
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// binder threads to 4.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">ProcessState</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">self</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setThreadPoolMaxThreadCount</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Set uclamp.min setting on all threads, maybe an overkill but we want
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// to cover important threads like RenderEngine.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setSchedAttr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Couldn&#39;t set uclamp.min: %s</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s">&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">strerror</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errno</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// The binder threadpool we start will inherit sched policy and priority
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// of (this) creating thread. We want the binder thread pool to have
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// SCHED_FIFO policy and priority 1 (lowest RT priority)
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// Once the pool is created we reset this thread&#39;s priority back to
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// original.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">newPriority</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">origPolicy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sched_getscheduler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">struct</span> <span class="nc">sched_param</span> <span class="n">origSchedParam</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">errorInPriorityModification</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sched_getparam</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">origSchedParam</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errorInPriorityModification</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SCHED_FIFO</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">newPriority</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sched_get_priority_min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">struct</span> <span class="nc">sched_param</span> <span class="n">param</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">param</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sched_priority</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">newPriority</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">errorInPriorityModification</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sched_setscheduler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">param</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// start the thread pool
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//构建ProcessState全局对象gProcess，打开binder驱动，建立链接
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//在驱动内部创建该进程的binder_proc,binder_thread结构，保存该进程的进程信息和线程信息，并加入驱动的红黑树队列中。
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//获取驱动的版本信息，把该进程最多可同时启动的线程告诉驱动，并保存到改进程的binder_proc结构中
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//把设备文件/dev/binder映射到内存中
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ProcessState</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">ps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ProcessState</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">self</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ps</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">startThreadPool</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Reset current thread&#39;s policy and priority
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errorInPriorityModification</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">errorInPriorityModification</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sched_setscheduler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">origPolicy</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">origSchedParam</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Failed to set SurfaceFlinger binder threadpool priority to SCHED_FIFO&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// instantiate surfaceflinger
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 实例化surfaceflinger
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">flinger</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">surfaceflinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createSurfaceFlinger</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Set the minimum policy of surfaceflinger node to be SCHED_FIFO.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// So any thread with policy/priority lower than {SCHED_FIFO, 1}, will run
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// at least with SCHED_FIFO policy and priority 1.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errorInPriorityModification</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">flinger</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setMinSchedulerPolicy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SCHED_FIFO</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">newPriority</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//设置优先级
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">setpriority</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PRIO_PROCESS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">PRIORITY_URGENT_DISPLAY</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">//把SF的自身调用限制在4线程
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">set_sched_policy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SP_FOREGROUND</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Put most SurfaceFlinger threads in the system-background cpuset
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// Keeps us from unnecessarily using big cores
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// Do this after the binder thread pool init
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">cpusets_enabled</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="n">set_cpuset_policy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SP_SYSTEM</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// initialize before clients can connect
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 在客户端连接之前进行初始化
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">flinger</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">init</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// publish surface flinger
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 将surfaceflinger放入servicemanager
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IServiceManager</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">sm</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">defaultServiceManager</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sm</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">addService</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">String16</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">getServiceName</span><span class="p">()),</span> <span class="n">flinger</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">IServiceManager</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DUMP_FLAG_PRIORITY_CRITICAL</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">IServiceManager</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DUMP_FLAG_PROTO</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// publish gui::ISurfaceComposer, the new AIDL interface
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">SurfaceComposerAIDL</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">composerAIDL</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="n">SurfaceComposerAIDL</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">flinger</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sm</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">addService</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">String16</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;SurfaceFlingerAIDL&#34;</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">composerAIDL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">IServiceManager</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DUMP_FLAG_PRIORITY_CRITICAL</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">IServiceManager</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DUMP_FLAG_PROTO</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">startDisplayService</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="c1">// dependency on SF getting registered above
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setSchedFifo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Couldn&#39;t set to SCHED_FIFO: %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">strerror</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errno</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// run surface flinger in this thread
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// 运行surfaceflinger这个线程
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">flinger</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">run</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>上面方法主要处理如下：</p>
<p>1、调用surfaceflinger的createSurfaceFlinger方法，实例化surfaceflinger。</p>
<p>2、调用flinger(surfaceflinger)的init()方法，在客户端连接之前进行初始化。</p>
<p>3、调用flinger(surfaceflinger)的run()方法，运行surfaceflinger这个线程。</p>
<p>下面分别进行分析：</p>
<h2 id="surfaceflinger-createsurfaceflinger" class="heading-element"><span>surfaceflinger createSurfaceFlinger</span>

<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/SurfaceflingerFactory.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">createSurfaceFlinger</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static</span> <span class="n">DefaultFactory</span> <span class="n">factory</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="nf">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">factory</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="new-surfaceflinger" class="heading-element"><span>new surfaceflinger</span>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Factory</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">factory</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">factory</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SkipInitialization</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGI</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;SurfaceFlinger is starting&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">hasSyncFramework</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">running_without_sync_framework</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispSyncPresentTimeOffset</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">present_time_offset_from_vsync_ns</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">useHwcForRgbToYuv</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">force_hwc_copy_for_virtual_displays</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">maxFrameBufferAcquiredBuffers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">max_frame_buffer_acquired_buffers</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">maxGraphicsWidth</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_graphics_width</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">maxGraphicsHeight</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">max_graphics_height</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">hasWideColorDisplay</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">has_wide_color_display</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDefaultCompositionDataspace</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Dataspace</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_composition_dataspace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Dataspace</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">V0_SRGB</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mWideColorGamutCompositionDataspace</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Dataspace</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">wcg_composition_dataspace</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">hasWideColorDisplay</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">Dataspace</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">DISPLAY_P3</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Dataspace</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">V0_SRGB</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">defaultCompositionDataspace</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mDefaultCompositionDataspace</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">wideColorGamutCompositionDataspace</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mWideColorGamutCompositionDataspace</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">defaultCompositionPixelFormat</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">default_composition_pixel_format</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RGBA_8888</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">wideColorGamutCompositionPixelFormat</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">wcg_composition_pixel_format</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RGBA_8888</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mColorSpaceAgnosticDataspace</span> <span class="o">=</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">enable</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">sysprop</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">SurfaceFlingerProperties</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">enable_layer_caching</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">value_or</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">GetBoolProperty</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">string</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.enable_layer_caching&#34;</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">enable</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">useContextPriority</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">use_context_priority</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mInternalDisplayPrimaries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sysprop</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">getDisplayNativePrimaries</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="kt">char</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">PROPERTY_VALUE_MAX</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;ro.bq.gpu_to_cpu_unsupported&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;0&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mGpuToCpuSupported</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">debugDdms</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGI_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">debugDdms</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;DDMS debugging not supported&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.enable_gl_backpressure&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;0&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPropagateBackpressureClientComposition</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGI_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mPropagateBackpressureClientComposition</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;Enabling backpressure propagation for Client Composition&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;ro.surface_flinger.supports_background_blur&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;0&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">supportsBlurs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSupportsBlur</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">supportsBlurs</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGI_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mSupportsBlur</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Disabling blur effects, they are not supported.&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;ro.sf.blurs_are_expensive&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;0&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mBlursAreExpensive</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">defaultListSize</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ISurfaceComposer</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">MAX_LAYERS</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">listSize</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">property_get_int32</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.max_igbp_list_size&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kt">int32_t</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">defaultListSize</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mMaxGraphicBufferProducerListSize</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">listSize</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">size_t</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">listSize</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">defaultListSize</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mGraphicBufferProducerListSizeLogThreshold</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">int</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mf">0.95</span> <span class="o">*</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">double</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMaxGraphicBufferProducerListSize</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.luma_sampling&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;1&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mLumaSampling</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.disable_client_composition_cache&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;0&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDisableClientCompositionCache</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.predict_hwc_composition_strategy&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;1&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPredictCompositionStrategy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.treat_170m_as_sRGB&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;0&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mTreat170mAsSrgb</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// We should be reading &#39;persist.sys.sf.color_saturation&#39; here
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// but since /data may be encrypted, we need to wait until after vold
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// comes online to attempt to read the property. The property is
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// instead read after the boot animation
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">GetBoolProperty</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.treble_testing_override&#34;</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Without the override SurfaceFlinger cannot connect to HIDL
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// services that are not listed in the manifests. Considered
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// deriving the setting from the set service name, but it
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// would be brittle if the name that&#39;s not &#39;default&#39; is used
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// for production purposes later on.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">ALOGI</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Enabling Treble testing override&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">hardware</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">details</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">setTrebleTestingOverride</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mRefreshRateOverlaySpinner</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">property_get_bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;sf.debug.show_refresh_rate_overlay_spinner&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mIsUserBuild</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">GetBoolProperty</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.enable_transaction_tracing&#34;</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mTransactionTracing</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">emplace</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mIgnoreHdrCameraLayers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ignore_hdr_camera_layers</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>SurfaceFlinger继承BnSurfaceComposer，实现ISurfaceComposer接口，实现ComposerCallback，PriorityDumper是一个辅助类，提供了SurfaceFlinger的dump信息。ISurfaceComposer 是Client端对SurfaceFlinger进程的binder接口调用。</p>
<p>ComposerCallback，这个是HWC模块的回调，这个包含了三个很关键的回调函数，onComposerHotplug函数表示显示屏热插拔事件， onComposerHalRefresh函数表示Refresh事件，onComposerHalVsync表示Vsync信号事件。</p>
<h2 id="surfaceflinger-init" class="heading-element"><span>surfaceflinger init</span>
 <a href="#surfaceflinger-init" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>调用flinger的init()方法，在客户端连接之前进行初始化：</p>
<p>在SurfaceFlingger初始化时，会向HWComposer注册回调，HWComposer会通过HWBinder向硬件测注册回调。</p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger搭建好处理Vsync的基础设施，初始化Scheduler，DispVsyncSoure以及最重要的EventThread。 EventThread的threadMain方法无限循环处理pendingEvents,对Vsync类型的Event分发到消费者，通过往消费者的FD写数据，通知APP有Vsync信号到来。pendingEvents中的消息处理完了，分发线程等待mCondition的通知。</p>
<p>当HWComposer收到硬件通过HWBinder回调onVSyncEvent时，会通过SurfaceFlinger的onVSyncEvent最终调用到EventThread的onVSyncEvent，于是调用makeVSync生成Vsync的Event, 添加到pendingEvents,然后再调用mCondition.notify_all()唤起等待中的分发线程。</p>
