<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">init</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGI</span><span class="p">(</span> <span class="s">&#34;SurfaceFlinger&#39;s main thread ready to run. &#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;Initializing graphics H/W...&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">Mutex</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Autolock</span> <span class="n">_l</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mStateLock</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Get a RenderEngine for the given display / config (can&#39;t fail)
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// TODO(b/77156734): We need to stop casting and use HAL types when possible.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// Sending maxFrameBufferAcquiredBuffers as the cache size is tightly tuned to single-display.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//获取给定显示/配置的 RenderEngine，并且设置一些参数
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">builder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">renderengine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RenderEngineCreationArgs</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Builder</span><span class="p">()</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setPixelFormat</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">int32_t</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">defaultCompositionPixelFormat</span><span class="p">))</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setImageCacheSize</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">maxFrameBufferAcquiredBuffers</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setUseColorManagerment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">useColorManagement</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setEnableProtectedContext</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">enable_protected_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">))</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setPrecacheToneMapperShaderOnly</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setSupportsBackgroundBlur</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mSupportsBlur</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setContextPriority</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">useContextPriority</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">?</span> <span class="n">renderengine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RenderEngine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ContextPriority</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="nl">REALTIME</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">renderengine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RenderEngine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ContextPriority</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">MEDIUM</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chooseRenderEngineTypeViaSysProp</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setRenderEngineType</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">type</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCompositionEngine</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setRenderEngine</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">renderengine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RenderEngine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">create</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">build</span><span class="p">()));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mMaxRenderTargetSize</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getRenderEngine</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">getMaxTextureSize</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">getRenderEngine</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">getMaxViewportDims</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Set SF main policy after initializing RenderEngine which has its own policy.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">SetTaskProfiles</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s">&#34;SFMainPolicy&#34;</span><span class="p">}))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Failed to set main task profile&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCompositionEngine</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setTimeStats</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mTimeStats</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCompositionEngine</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setHwComposer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getFactory</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">createHWComposer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mHwcServiceName</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCompositionEngine</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">setCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ClientCache</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">getInstance</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">setRenderEngine</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">getRenderEngine</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">enableLatchUnsignaledConfig</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getLatchUnsignaledConfig</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">GetBoolProperty</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.enable_hwc_vds&#34;</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">enableHalVirtualDisplays</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Process any initial hotplug and resulting display changes.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">processDisplayHotplugEventsLocked</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getDefaultDisplayDeviceLocked</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Missing primary display after registering composer callback.&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getPhysicalId</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">isConnected</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;Primary display is disconnected.&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// initialize our drawing state
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mDrawingState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// set initial conditions (e.g. unblank default device)
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">initializeDisplays</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPowerAdvisor</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">init</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">char</span> <span class="n">primeShaderCache</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">PROPERTY_VALUE_MAX</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">property_get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;service.sf.prime_shader_cache&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">primeShaderCache</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;1&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">atoi</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">primeShaderCache</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">setSchedFifo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Can&#39;t set SCHED_OTHER for primeCache&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mRenderEnginePrimeCacheFuture</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getRenderEngine</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">primeCache</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">setSchedFifo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Can&#39;t set SCHED_OTHER for primeCache&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">onActiveDisplaySizeChanged</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Inform native graphics APIs whether the present timestamp is supported:
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">presentFenceReliable</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">hasCapability</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Capability</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PRESENT_FENCE_IS_NOT_RELIABLE</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mStartPropertySetThread</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getFactory</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">createStartPropertySetThread</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">presentFenceReliable</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mStartPropertySetThread</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">Start</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Run StartPropertySetThread failed!&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Done initializing&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">processDisplayHotplugEventsLocked</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="nl">event</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">mPendingHotplugEvents</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">optional</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">DisplayIdentificationInfo</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">info</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">onHotplug</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connection</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">continue</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">info</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mPhysicalDisplayTokens</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">connection</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">hal</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Connection</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">CONNECTED</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">supportedModes</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">activeMode</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">loadDisplayModes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Creating display %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">to_string</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">getDisplayConnectionType</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">event</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">deviceProductInfo</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">deviceProductInfo</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">supportedModes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">supportedModes</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">.</span><span class="n">activeMode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">activeMode</span><span class="p">)};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isSecure</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="c1">// All physical displays are currently considered secure.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayName</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="n">BBinder</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPhysicalDisplayTokens</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">try_emplace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mInterceptor</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">saveDisplayCreation</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Recreating display %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">to_string</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">state</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">editValueFor</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sequenceId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="p">{}.</span><span class="n">sequenceId</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="c1">// Generate new sequenceId.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">supportedModes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">supportedModes</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">activeMode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">activeMode</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">updatesDeviceProductInfoOnHotplugReconnect</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">deviceProductInfo</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">info</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">deviceProductInfo</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGV</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Removing display %s&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">to_string</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">).</span><span class="n">c_str</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">indexOfKey</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">token</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">());</span> <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">state</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">valueAt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mInterceptor</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">saveDisplayDeletion</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sequenceId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">removeItemsAt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPhysicalDisplayTokens</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">processDisplayChangesLocked</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mPendingHotplugEvents</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">clear</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">processDisplayChangesLocked</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// here we take advantage of Vector&#39;s copy-on-write semantics to
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// improve performance by skipping the transaction entirely when
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// know that the lists are identical
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">KeyedVector</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">KeyedVector</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">draw</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mDrawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isIdenticalTo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">draw</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVisibleRegionsDirty</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// find the displays that were removed
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// (ie: in drawing state but not in current state)
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// also handle displays that changed
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// (ie: displays that are in both lists)
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">draw</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">displayToken</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">draw</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">keyAt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">ssize_t</span> <span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">indexOfKey</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">j</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// in drawing state but not in current state
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">processDisplayRemoved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// this display is in both lists. see if something changed.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">currentState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">j</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">draw</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">processDisplayChanged</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// find displays that were added
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// (ie: in current state but not in drawing state)
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">size_t</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">size</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="n">i</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">displayToken</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">keyAt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">draw</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">indexOfKey</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">processDisplayAdded</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">curr</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDrawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mCurrentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displays</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>上面方法主要处理如下：</p>
<p>1、调用processDisplayRemoved方法。</p>
<p>2、调用processDisplayChanged方法。</p>
<p>3、调用processDisplayAdded方法。</p>
<p>下面分别进行分析：</p>
<h3 id="surfaceflinger-processdisplayremoved" class="heading-element"><span>surfaceflinger processDisplayRemoved</span>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">processDisplayRemoved</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getDisplayDeviceLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">disconnect</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">isVirtual</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">releaseVirtualDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getVirtualId</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchDisplayHotplugEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getPhysicalId</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDisplays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">isVirtual</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="kt">void</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">schedule</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">)]</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Destroy the display without holding the mStateLock.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// This is a temporary solution until we can manage transaction queues without
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// holding the mStateLock.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// With blast, the IGBP that is passed to the VirtualDisplaySurface is owned by the
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// client. When the IGBP is disconnected, its buffer cache in SF will be cleared
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// via SurfaceComposerClient::doUncacheBufferTransaction. This call from the client
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// ends up running on the main thread causing a deadlock since setTransactionstate
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// will try to acquire the mStateLock. Instead we extend the lifetime of
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// DisplayDevice and destroy it in the main thread without holding the mStateLock.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// The display will be disconnected and removed from the mDisplays list so it will
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// not be accessible.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">processDisplayChanged</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">currentBinder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">IInterface</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">asBinder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">drawingBinder</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">IInterface</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">asBinder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Recreate the DisplayDevice if the surface or sequence ID changed.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentBinder</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingBinder</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sequenceId</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sequenceId</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">getRenderEngine</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">cleanFramebufferCache</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getDisplayDeviceLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">disconnect</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">isVirtual</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">releaseVirtualDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getVirtualId</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDisplays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">erase</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">physical</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">allocatePhysicalDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">processDisplayAdded</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getDisplayDeviceLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">setPowerModeInternal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">hal</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PowerMode</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ON</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// TODO(b/175678251) Call a listener instead.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">hwcDisplayId</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">getPrimaryHwcDisplayId</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">updateInternalDisplayVsyncLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getDisplayDeviceLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">layerStack</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">layerStack</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setLayerStack</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">layerStack</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">flags</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">flags</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setFlags</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">flags</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">((</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">orientation</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">orientation</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">layerStackSpaceRect</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">layerStackSpaceRect</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">orientedDisplaySpaceRect</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">orientedDisplaySpaceRect</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setProjection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">orientation</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">layerStackSpaceRect</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">orientedDisplaySpaceRect</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">isDisplayActiveLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mActiveDisplayTransformHint</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getTransformHint</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">width</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">width</span> <span class="o">||</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">height</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">drawingState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">height</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setDisplaySize</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">width</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">currentState</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">height</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">isDisplayActiveLocked</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">onActiveDisplaySizeChanged</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
