<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">processDisplayAdded</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">wp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">DisplayDeviceState</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Size</span> <span class="n">resolution</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span> <span class="n">pixelFormat</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PIXEL_FORMAT_UNKNOWN</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">resolution</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">activeMode</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getResolution</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">pixelFormat</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PIXEL_FORMAT_RGBA_8888</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nf">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">query</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NATIVE_WINDOW_WIDTH</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">resolution</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">width</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Unable to query width (%d)&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">query</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NATIVE_WINDOW_HEIGHT</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">resolution</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">height</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Unable to query height (%d)&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">format</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">query</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NATIVE_WINDOW_FORMAT</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">status</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">NO_ERROR</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s">&#34;Unable to query format (%d)&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">pixelFormat</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PixelFormat</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">format</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Virtual displays without a surface are dormant:
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// they have external state (layer stack, projection,
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// etc.) but no internal state (i.e. a DisplayDevice).
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">compositionengine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DisplayCreationArgsBuilder</span> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">physical</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setId</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setId</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">acquireVirtualDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">resolution</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pixelFormat</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setPixels</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">resolution</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setIsSecure</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isSecure</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setPowerAdvisor</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mPowerAdvisor</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">setName</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayName</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">compositionDisplay</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getCompositionEngine</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">createDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">builder</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">build</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">compositionDisplay</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setLayerCachingEnabled</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mLayerCachingEnabled</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">compositionengine</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DisplaySurface</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">displaySurface</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IGraphicBufferProducer</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">producer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IGraphicBufferProducer</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">bqProducer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">IGraphicBufferConsumer</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">bqConsumer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">getFactory</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">createBufferQueue</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">bqProducer</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">bqConsumer</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="cm">/*consumerIsSurfaceFlinger =*/</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isVirtual</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">VirtualDisplayId</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">tryCast</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">compositionDisplay</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getId</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">surface</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VirtualDisplaySurface</span><span class="o">&gt;::</span><span class="n">make</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">bqProducer</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bqConsumer</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">displayName</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">displaySurface</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">surface</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">producer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;adding a supported display, but rendering &#34;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;surface is provided (%p), ignoring it&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">surface</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">displayId</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">PhysicalDisplayId</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">tryCast</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">compositionDisplay</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getId</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">displaySurface</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">FramebufferSurface</span><span class="o">&gt;::</span><span class="n">make</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">displayId</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">bqConsumer</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">physical</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">activeMode</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getResolution</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ui</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Size</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">maxGraphicsWidth</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">maxGraphicsHeight</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">producer</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bqProducer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">displaySurface</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">setupNewDisplayDeviceInternal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">compositionDisplay</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">state</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">displaySurface</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">producer</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">isPrimary</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">initScheduler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">state</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">isVirtual</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">dispatchDisplayHotplugEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getPhysicalId</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mDisplays</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">try_emplace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">displayToken</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
