<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">initScheduler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">DisplayDevice</span><span class="o">&gt;&amp;</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// If the scheduler is already initialized, this means that we received
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// a hotplug(connected) on the primary display. In that case we should
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// update the scheduler with the most recent display information.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">ALOGW</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Scheduler already initialized, updating instead&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setRefreshRateConfigs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">holdRefreshRateConfigs</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">currRefreshRate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getActiveMode</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getFps</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mRefreshRateStats</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">RefreshRateStats</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mTimeStats</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">currRefreshRate</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">hal</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PowerMode</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">OFF</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsyncConfiguration</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">getFactory</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">createVsyncConfiguration</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">currRefreshRate</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVsyncModulator</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sp</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VsyncModulator</span><span class="o">&gt;::</span><span class="n">make</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVsyncConfiguration</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getCurrentConfigs</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">using</span> <span class="n">Feature</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Feature</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">FeatureFlags</span> <span class="n">features</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">sysprop</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">use_content_detection_for_refresh_rate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">features</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">Feature</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kContentDetection</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">GetBoolProperty</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.show_predicted_vsync&#34;</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">features</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">Feature</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kTracePredictedVsync</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">GetBoolProperty</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;debug.sf.vsync_reactor_ignore_present_fences&#34;</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">getHwComposer</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">hasCapability</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">Capability</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">PRESENT_FENCE_IS_NOT_RELIABLE</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">features</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">Feature</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kPresentFences</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// 创建Scheduler对象
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ICompositor</span><span class="o">&amp;&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">static_cast</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">ISchedulerCallback</span><span class="o">&amp;&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">features</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">configs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">holdRefreshRateConfigs</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">configs</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">kernelIdleTimerController</span><span class="p">().</span><span class="n">has_value</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">features</span> <span class="o">|=</span> <span class="n">Feature</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">kKernelIdleTimer</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">createVsyncSchedule</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">features</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setRefreshRateConfigs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">configs</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">setVsyncEnabled</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">startTimers</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">configs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">mVsyncConfiguration</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getCurrentConfigs</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">currRefreshRate</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">getPeriodNsecs</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mAppConnectionHandle</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">createConnection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;app&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mFrameTimeline</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getTokenManager</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*workDuration=*/</span><span class="n">configs</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">late</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">appWorkDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*readyDuration=*/</span><span class="n">configs</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">late</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sfWorkDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">impl</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">InterceptVSyncsCallback</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mSfConnectionHandle</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">createConnection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;appSf&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mFrameTimeline</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getTokenManager</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*workDuration=*/</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="cm">/*readyDuration=*/</span><span class="n">configs</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">late</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sfWorkDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">[</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">](</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mInterceptor</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">saveVSyncEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timestamp</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">initVsync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getVsyncDispatch</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mFrameTimeline</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getTokenManager</span><span class="p">(),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">configs</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">late</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sfWorkDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mRegionSamplingThread</span> <span class="o">=</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="n">RegionSamplingThread</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">RegionSamplingThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EnvironmentTimingTunables</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mFpsReporter</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="n">FpsReporter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">mFrameTimeline</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Dispatch a mode change request for the primary display on scheduler
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// initialization, so that the EventThreads always contain a reference to a
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// prior configuration.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">//
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// This is a bit hacky, but this avoids a back-pointer into the main SF
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// classes from EventThread, and there should be no run-time binder cost
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="c1">// anyway since there are no connected apps at this point.
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onPrimaryDisplayModeChanged</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mAppConnectionHandle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getActiveMode</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>上面方法主要处理如下：</p>
<p>1、创建Scheduler对象，Scheduler是SurfaceFlinger的调度器。</p>
<p>2、调用mScheduler(Scheduler)的createConnection方法创建mAppConnectionHandle和mSfConnectionHandle对象。</p>
<p>3、调用Scheduler的initVsync方法，初始化Vsync。</p>
<p>下面分别进行分析：</p>
<h5 id="new-scheduler" class="heading-element"><span>new Scheduler</span>
 <a href="#new-scheduler" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>创建Scheduler对象，Scheduler是SurfaceFlinger的调度器，Scheduler的构造方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/Scheduler.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">Scheduler</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">impl</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">MessageQueue</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ICompositor</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">compositor</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ISchedulerCallback</span><span class="o">&amp;</span> <span class="n">callback</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">FeatureFlags</span> <span class="n">features</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">impl</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">MessageQueue</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">compositor</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">mFeatures</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">features</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">mSchedulerCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">callback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h5 id="scheduler-createconnection" class="heading-element"><span>Scheduler createConnection</span>
 <a href="#scheduler-createconnection" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>调用mScheduler(Scheduler)的createConnection方法创建mAppConnectionHandle和mSfConnectionHandle对象，一个名为&quot;app&quot;，用于APP绘制图像，一个名为&quot;sf&quot;，用于SurfaceFlinger合成：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/Scheduler.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">ConnectionHandle</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">createConnection</span><span class="p">(</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">const</span> <span class="kt">char</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">connectionName</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">frametimeline</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">TokenManager</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">chrono</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">nanoseconds</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">impl</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">InterceptVSyncsCallback</span> <span class="n">interceptCallback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">vsyncSource</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">makePrimaryDispSyncSource</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">connectionName</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">workDuration</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">readyDuration</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">throttleVsync</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">makeThrottleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">getVsyncPeriod</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">makeGetVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">auto</span> <span class="n">eventThread</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">make_unique</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">impl</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">&gt;</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vsyncSource</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">interceptCallback</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">throttleVsync</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getVsyncPeriod</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nf">createConnection</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">eventThread</span><span class="p">));</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>创建EventThread对象，EventThread的构造方法如下：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span><span class="lnt">34
</span><span class="lnt">35
</span><span class="lnt">36
</span><span class="lnt">37
</span><span class="lnt">38
</span><span class="lnt">39
</span><span class="lnt">40
</span><span class="lnt">41
</span><span class="lnt">42
</span><span class="lnt">43
</span><span class="lnt">44
</span><span class="lnt">45
</span><span class="lnt">46
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Scheduler/EventThread.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">EventThread</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">VSyncSource</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Callback</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">EventThread</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">VSyncSource</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">vsyncSource</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">android</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">frametimeline</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">TokenManager</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">InterceptVSyncsCallback</span> <span class="n">interceptVSyncsCallback</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ThrottleVsyncCallback</span> <span class="n">throttleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">GetVsyncPeriodFunction</span> <span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">vsyncSource</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mTokenManager</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tokenManager</span><span class="p">),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mInterceptVSyncsCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">interceptVSyncsCallback</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mThrottleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">throttleVsyncCallback</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mGetVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">move</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFunction</span><span class="p">)),</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mThreadName</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">getName</span><span class="p">())</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">LOG_ALWAYS_FATAL_IF</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">getVsyncPeriodFunction</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="s">&#34;getVsyncPeriodFunction must not be null&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncSource</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">setCallback</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">);</span> <span class="c1">//设置VsyncSource回调
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mThread</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="kr">thread</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="k">this</span><span class="p">]()</span> <span class="n">NO_THREAD_SAFETY_ANALYSIS</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_lock</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mMutex</span><span class="p">);</span> <span class="c1">//创建一个线程
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="n">threadMain</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">);</span> <span class="c1">//调用threadMain方法，接收回调消息
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">pthread_setname_np</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mThread</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">native_handle</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">mThreadName</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">pid_t</span> <span class="n">tid</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pthread_gettid_np</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mThread</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">native_handle</span><span class="p">());</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1">// Use SCHED_FIFO to minimize jitter
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="k">constexpr</span> <span class="kt">int</span> <span class="n">EVENT_THREAD_PRIORITY</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">struct</span> <span class="nc">sched_param</span> <span class="n">param</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">};</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">param</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">sched_priority</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">EVENT_THREAD_PRIORITY</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pthread_setschedparam</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mThread</span><span class="p">.</span><span class="n">native_handle</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">SCHED_FIFO</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">&amp;</span><span class="n">param</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">ALOGE</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s">&#34;Couldn&#39;t set SCHED_FIFO for EventThread&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">set_sched_policy</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">tid</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SP_FOREGROUND</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>在上面方法中先会设置VsyncSource回调，然后创建一个线程，调用调用threadMain方法，在threadMain方法中会循环接收回调消息，然后进行处理：</p>
<p>待补充</p>
<h5 id="scheduler-initvsync" class="heading-element"><span>Scheduler initVsync</span>
 <a href="#scheduler-initvsync" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>调用Scheduler的initVsync方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">InjectVSyncSource</span><span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">mVSyncInjector</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">nullptr</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">bool</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">injectVSync</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">when</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mInjectVSyncs</span> <span class="o">||</span> <span class="o">!</span><span class="n">mVSyncInjector</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">false</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mVSyncInjector</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onInjectSyncEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">when</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTime</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>调用InjectVSyncSource的onInjectSyncEvent方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">InjectVSyncSource</span> <span class="k">final</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">VSyncSource</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="kt">void</span> <span class="nf">onInjectSyncEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">when</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">expectedVSyncTimestamp</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">nsecs_t</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">lock_guard</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">mutex</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">lock</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCallbackMutex</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mCallback</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mCallback</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">onVSyncEvent</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">when</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">expectedVSyncTimestamp</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">deadlineTimestamp</span><span class="p">});</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="surfaceflinger-run" class="heading-element"><span>surfaceflinger run</span>
 <a href="#surfaceflinger-run" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>调用flinger的run()方法，运行surfaceflinger这个线程：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="n">std</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">unique_ptr</span><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">SurfaceFlinger</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">run</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">mScheduler</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">run</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="scheduler-run" class="heading-element"><span>Scheduler run</span>
 <a href="#scheduler-run" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>调用Scheduler的run方法：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1">//frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Surfaceflinger.cpp
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span><span class="kt">void</span> <span class="n">Scheduler</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">run</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">while</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">true</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">waitMessage</span><span class="p">();</span> <span class="c1">//等待消息
</span></span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="c1"></span> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>

item.title: Android SurfaceFlinger-CSDN博客
item.author: huang8604@163.com (wentao)
item.description:
<h2 id="一surfaceflinger介绍" class="heading-element"><span>一、SurfaceFlinger介绍</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%80surfaceflinger%e4%bb%8b%e7%bb%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>SurfaceFlinger是Android系统中的一个重要组件，它主要负责窗口管理与界面显示。具体来说，SurfaceFlinger作为系统的显示引擎，负责接收各应用程序发来的图像数据，并组合成一张完整的画面，并输出到显示屏上。SurfaceFlinger通过重绘整个屏幕或部分屏幕来更新UI界面。它还提供了多种硬件加速技术，如OpenGL ES、Vulkan等，使应用程序能够更快地渲染UI界面。</p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger还支持窗口叠加、透明度、混合模式等特性，以支持复杂的多层UI界面。此外，它还能管理所有Surface对象（如视频、图片等），并为每个Surface对象分配一个BufferQueue（缓冲区队列），确保每个Surface都能按时完成显示。</p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger启动流程：</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4a82e.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4a82e.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>7c3cdce4fc9cf51f45117ffe66f4b801_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4a82e.png" alt="7c3cdce4fc9cf51f45117ffe66f4b801_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4a82e.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4a82e.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4a82e.png?size=large 2x" data-title="7c3cdce4fc9cf51f45117ffe66f4b801_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger送显的流程：</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcb63ed4.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcb63ed4.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>67c08f8816f82eb2d4aa474e0b8f0afc_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcb63ed4.png" alt="67c08f8816f82eb2d4aa474e0b8f0afc_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcb63ed4.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcb63ed4.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcb63ed4.png?size=large 2x" data-title="67c08f8816f82eb2d4aa474e0b8f0afc_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h2 id="二surface的渲染" class="heading-element"><span>二、Surface的渲染</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8csurface%e7%9a%84%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>Android系统的UI从绘制到显示在屏幕上可分为两个步骤：</p>
<p>1、Android App进程：将UI绘制到一个图形缓冲区GraphicBuffer中，然后通知SurfaceFlinger进行合成。</p>
<p>2、SurfaceFlinger进程：将GraphicBuffer数据合成并交给屏幕缓冲区去显示，这一步本身就是通过软件（Skia）和硬件（Open GL和 HardWare Composer）去完成的。</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcceef78.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcceef78.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>4323522b253b39d24b7785bf122431d9_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcceef78.png" alt="4323522b253b39d24b7785bf122431d9_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcceef78.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcceef78.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcceef78.png?size=large 2x" data-title="4323522b253b39d24b7785bf122431d9_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h4 id="软件渲染介绍" class="heading-element"><span>软件渲染介绍</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bd%af%e4%bb%b6%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93%e4%bb%8b%e7%bb%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>当App更新部分UI时，CPU会遍历ViewTree计算处需要重绘的赃区，接着在View层次结构中绘制所有跟脏区相交的区域，因此软件绘制会绘制到不需要重绘的视图。</p>
<p>软件绘制的绘制过程是在主线程进行的，可能会造成卡顿等情况。</p>
<p>软件绘制把要绘制的内容写进一个Bitmap位图，在之后的渲染过程中，这个Bitmap的像素内容会填充到Surface的缓冲区里。</p>
<p>软件绘制使用Skia库，Skia是Google开发的一个跨平台的2D图形库，它提供了一组强大的API，可以实现高质量的2D图形渲染。</p>
<p>需要注意的是，软件渲染的性能相对较低，而且可能会因为大量的图像计算而占用大量CPU资源，导致应用程序的运行速度变慢。</p>
<p>如下为软件渲染流程：</p>
<p>1、构建视图树：Android应用程序中的UI由视图树来组织的，首先需要构建视图树。</p>
<p>2、计算布局：在获得视图树之后，系统需要计算每个视图的大小和位置，并将它们放置在正确的位置上，以完成布局。</p>
<p>3、绘制视图：接下来，系统将开始使用软件渲染引擎(Skia)，对每一个视图进行主意绘制，即使用CPU执行图像计算并将图像渲染到GraphicBuffer上。</p>
<p>4、合成图像：当所有的视图都绘制完成后，SurfaceFlinger会将它们合成在一起，生成最终屏幕图像，并将其放到主显示缓冲区中。</p>
<h4 id="硬件渲染介绍" class="heading-element"><span>硬件渲染介绍</span>
 <a href="#%e7%a1%ac%e4%bb%b6%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93%e4%bb%8b%e7%bb%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>当App更新部分UI时，CPU会计算出脏区，但是不会立即执行绘制命令，而是将darwXXX函数作为绘制指令(DrawOp)记录在一个列表(DisplayList中)，然后交给单独的Render线程使用GPU进行硬件加速渲染。</p>
<p>只需要针对需要更新的View对象的脏区进行记录或更新，无需更新的View对象则能重用先前DisplayList中记录的指令。</p>
<p>硬件加速是在单独的Render线程中绘制的，分担了主线程的压力，提高了响应速度。</p>
<p>硬件绘制使用OpenGL在GPU上完成，OpenGL是跨平台的图形API，为2D/3D图形处理硬件制定了标志的软件接口。</p>
<p>如下为硬件渲染的流程：</p>
<p>1、构建视图树：与软件渲染一样，硬件渲染也需要构建应用程序的视图树。</p>
<p>2、计算布局：与软件渲染一样，硬件渲染也需要对每个视图计算布局。</p>
<p>3、创建OpenGL的渲染上下文和纹理：Android使用OpenGL ES作为硬件加速的渲染引擎。因此，当硬件加速被开启时，系统会创建OpenGL的渲染上下文，同时为每个视图分配一个渲染纹理。</p>
<p>4、上传纹理数据：在计算好视图的布局之后，系统将视图的图像数据上传到渲染纹理中。这通常由GPU完成。</p>
<p>5、绘制纹理：最后，系统将视图的渲染纹理绑定到OpenGL的渲染上下文中，并执行GPU计算，即使用GPU绘制图像。</p>
<p>6、合成图像：当所有的视图都绘制完成后，SurfaceFlinger会将它们合成在一起，生成最终屏幕图像，并将其放到主显示缓冲区中。</p>
<h4 id="android在什么时候使用软件渲染什么时候使用硬件渲染" class="heading-element"><span>Android在什么时候使用软件渲染、什么时候使用硬件渲染？</span>
 <a href="#android%e5%9c%a8%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e6%97%b6%e5%80%99%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8%e8%bd%af%e4%bb%b6%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e6%97%b6%e5%80%99%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8%e7%a1%ac%e4%bb%b6%e6%b8%b2%e6%9f%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>在Android系统中，软件渲染和硬件渲染是根据应用程序的需求和设备的性能决定的的。通常情况，系统会优先使用硬件渲染来提高图形的速度和效率。如果系统检测到设备的GPU不支持某种特定的图像特效或功能，或在硬件渲染的过程中出现问题，那么系统将退回到软件渲染。下列情况可能触发系统使用软件渲染：</p>
<p>1、设备的GPU不支持当前应用程序的某些特性或图像格式。</p>
<p>2、当前应用程序需要在屏幕上叠加多个图像层，而GPU能力不足以处理所有的层级叠加。</p>
<p>3、在某些情况下，使用硬件加速可能会导致应用程序出现性能问题，此时系统可能会切换到使用软件渲染。</p>
<h4 id="surfaceflinger的双缓冲与vsync机制" class="heading-element"><span>SurfaceFlinger的双缓冲与VSYNC机制</span>
 <a href="#surfaceflinger%e7%9a%84%e5%8f%8c%e7%bc%93%e5%86%b2%e4%b8%8evsync%e6%9c%ba%e5%88%b6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd609c.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd609c.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>aeed01eef4364229d6c76a2bd2375b45_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd609c.png" alt="aeed01eef4364229d6c76a2bd2375b45_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd609c.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd609c.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd609c.png?size=large 2x" data-title="aeed01eef4364229d6c76a2bd2375b45_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h4 id="缓冲机制介绍" class="heading-element"><span>缓冲机制介绍</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bc%93%e5%86%b2%e6%9c%ba%e5%88%b6%e4%bb%8b%e7%bb%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>显示缓冲机制是指定在计算机系统中，将显示数据缓存到到内存中以提高处理速度的一种计算，在图形和图像处理中，显示缓冲机制可以提升图像、图形的渲染效率和质量。</p>
<p>在早期的Android版本中，SurfaceFlinger使用的是三重缓冲区机制，即前台、后台和显示三个缓冲区。从Android8.0开始，SurfaceFlinger该为采用双缓冲区机制，只有前台和后台两个缓冲区。采用三重缓冲区机制的优点在于可以减少屏幕撕裂现象的产生，提高显示画面的连贯性。但同时增加了内存占用，因此在Android8.0及以上版本中，为了提高性能和减少内存占用，SurfaceFlinger改为采用双缓冲区机制。</p>
<p>双缓冲区机制下，前台缓冲区用于显示当前帧的内容，后台缓冲区用于绘制下一帧的内容。当绘制下一帧完成后，SurfaceFlinger会将后台缓冲区的内容交换到前台缓冲区，从而实现帧与帧之间的切换。这种机制可以减少一次缓冲区的创建及销毁操作，以提高性能和解约内存。</p>
<p>三重缓存机制是Android中的一种优化技术，用于提高绘制性能。它包括前缓冲区（Front Buffer）、后缓冲区（Back Buffer）和显示缓冲区（Display Buffer）。前缓冲区用于显示当前帧，后缓冲区用于绘制下一帧，而显示缓冲区则用于将前缓冲区的内容显示在屏幕上。当VSYNC信号到达时，前缓冲区和后缓冲区会进行交换，从而实现流畅的显示效果。</p>
<h4 id="vsync机制介绍" class="heading-element"><span>VSYNC机制介绍</span>
 <a href="#vsync%e6%9c%ba%e5%88%b6%e4%bb%8b%e7%bb%8d" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>在图形和图像显示中，VSYNC是一个非常重要的概念，它是指垂直同步信号，用于控制显示器刷新率和显示时序。在Android系统中，VSYNC机制被广泛应用于控制屏幕显示和动画渲染，以提高显示效果和性能。</p>
<p>在Android中，每台设备都有一个硬件VSYNC信号发生器，用于生成恒定的刷新率信号。通常情况下这个信号的刷新率为60Hz或90Hz，Android显示框架可以根据这个信号来调整自己的显示和渲染速度。在SurfaceFlinger的生成者消费者模型中，当硬件VSYNC信号发生时，SurfaceFlinger会开始读取缓冲区中的数据，并将其显示在屏幕上。因此，如果Android显示框架在VSYNC前完成了数据处理和绘制，则可以实现零延迟的图像或动画渲染。</p>
<p>VSYNC机制的主要优点是可以避免在图像渲染过程中出现屏幕撕裂和卡顿现象，同时，使用硬件信号，可以使图形和图像处理与显示保持同步，提高显示效果和渲染性能。</p>
<p>由于图像绘制和屏幕读取 使用的是同个buffer，所以屏幕刷新时可能读取到的是不完整的一帧画面。双缓存，让绘制和显示器拥有各自的buffer：GPU 始终将完成的一帧图像数据写入到 Back Buffer，而显示器使用 Frame Buffer，当屏幕刷新时，Frame Buffer 并不会发生变化，当Back buffer准备就绪后，它们才进行交换。</p>
<p>什么时候进行两个buffer的交换呢？</p>
<p>当扫描完一帧画面后，设备需要重新回到第一行以进入下一次的循环，此时有一段时间空隙，称为VerticalBlanking Interval(VBI)。那，这个时间点就是我们进行缓冲区交换的最佳时间。因为此时屏幕没有在刷新，也就避免了交换过程中出现 screen tearing的状况。</p>
<p>VSYNC 信号是由屏幕（显示设备）产生的，利用VBI时期出现的vertical sync pulse（垂直同步脉冲）来保证双缓冲在最佳时间点才进行交换。并且以 60fps 的固定频率发送给 Android 系统，Android 系统中的 SurfaceFlinger 接收发送的 VSYNC 信号。VSYNC 信号表明可对屏幕进行刷新而不会产生撕裂。另外，交换是指各自的内存地址，可以认为该操作是瞬间完成。</p>
<p>Android 4.4上又引入了Vsync虚拟化，通过DispSyncThread把Vsync虚拟化成Vsync-app和Vsync-sf，Vsync-app和Vsync-sf直接有固定的时机偏移，各自分别掌控着App和SurfaceFlinger的工作节奏，他们一前一后保持着绘制任务的流水节奏。</p>
<p>CPU/GPU根据VSYNC信号同步处理数据，可以让CPU/GPU有完整的16ms时间来处理数据，减少了jank（丢帧）。</p>
<p>一句话总结，VSync同步使得CPU/GPU充分利用了16.6ms时间，减少jank。</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4ad5d.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4ad5d.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>b51202e8eb94635309ad5cd671d044cb_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4ad5d.png" alt="b51202e8eb94635309ad5cd671d044cb_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4ad5d.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4ad5d.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bcc4ad5d.png?size=large 2x" data-title="b51202e8eb94635309ad5cd671d044cb_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>应用在每个Vsync信号到来后都会通过dequeueBuffer/queueBuffer来申请buffer和提交绘图数据，Surfaceflinger都会在下一个vsync信号到来时取走buffer去做合成和显示， 并在下一下个vsync时将buffer还回来，再次循环。</p>
<p><a class="lightgallery" href="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd8ab4.png?size=large" data-thumbnail="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd8ab4.png?size=small" data-sub-html="<h2>99132b2ee5d388a22a3bab7b7ade4839_MD5</h2>"><img loading="lazy" src="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd8ab4.png" alt="99132b2ee5d388a22a3bab7b7ade4839_MD5" srcset="https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd8ab4.png?size=small, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd8ab4.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://picgo.myjojo.fun:666/i/2024/09/27/66f62bccd8ab4.png?size=large 2x" data-title="99132b2ee5d388a22a3bab7b7ade4839_MD5" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>

<h3 id="region" class="heading-element"><span>Region</span>
 <a href="#region" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>

</h3><p>Android UI Region是一个用于定义和操作矩形区域的类。它可以用于在屏幕上绘制和处理图形、文字和触摸事件等。Region类提供了一系列方法来创建、合并、裁剪和判断区域之间的关系。</p>
<p>Region代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/include/ui/Region.h</p>

</div><h3 id="isurfacecomposer" class="heading-element"><span>ISurfaceComposer</span>
 <a href="#isurfacecomposer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>ISurfaceComposer是Android系统中的一个接口，它是SurfaceFlinger服务的客户端与服务器端通信的主要接口，具体方法如下：</p>
<p>createDisplay：创建一个新的Display。</p>
<p>destroyDisplay：销毁指定Display。</p>
<p>setLayer：设置Surface的层级关系。</p>
<p>setAlpha：设置Surface的透明度。</p>
<p>setPosition：设置Surface的位置。</p>
<p>setSize：设置Surface的大小。</p>
<p>setCrop：设置Surface的裁剪区域。</p>
<p>setTransform：设置Surface的变换矩阵，用于实现缩放、选择效果。</p>
<p>ISurfaceComposer代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/include/gui/ISurfaceComposer.h</p>
<p>frameworks/native/libs/gui/ISurfaceComposer.cpp</p>
<p>ISurfaceComposer的定义：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">ISurfaceComposer</span><span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">IInterface</span> <span class="p">{}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="isurfacecomposerclient" class="heading-element"><span>ISurfaceComposerClient</span>
 <a href="#isurfacecomposerclient" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>ISurfaceComposer是Android系统中的一个接口，它是SurfaceFlinger服务的客户端与服务器端通信的主要接口，常见方法如下：</p>
<p>createSurface：创建一个新的Surface。</p>
<p>clearLayerFrameStats：清除Layer的帧间统计信息。</p>
<p>getLayerFrameStats：获取指定Layer的帧间通信信息。</p>
<p>ISurfaceComposerClient代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/include/gui/ISurfaceComposerClient.h</p>
<p>frameworks/native/libs/gui/ISurfaceComposerClient.cpp</p>

</span></code></pre></td>

<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">ISurfaceComposerClient</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">IInterface</span> <span class="p">{}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>

</div><h3 id="surfacecomposerclient" class="heading-element"><span>SurfaceComposerClient</span>
 <a href="#surfacecomposerclient" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>SurfaceComposerClient是Android系统中用于创建和管理图形表面的一个关键类，它提供了一个用于控件的图形界面API，使开发人员可以创建和操作图形表面，并将其渲染到屏幕上显示，SurfaceComposerClient的主要作用包括：</p>
<ul>
<li>创建和管理Surface对象：SurfaceComposerClient类提供了创建和管理Surface对象的方法，包括创建新的表面，设置表面的大小和位置，调整表面的缩放比例和透明度等操作，开发人员可以使用SurfaceComposerClient创建和管理Surface对象，并将其添加到应用程序的UI界面中。</li>
<li>创建和管理图层：开发人员可以使用SurfaceComposerClient类创建和管理图形图层，以实现在屏幕上显示复杂的图形效果。SurfaceComposerClient为开发人员提供了一组API函数来创建和管理图层，包括设置图层大小和位置、设置图层缩放和透明度、设置混合模式和动画等。</li>
<li>与SurfaceFlinger服务的交互：SurfaceComposerClient通过IPC机制与系统级SurfaceFlinger服务通信，从而实现了应用程序和SurfaceFlinger之间的交互。开发人员可以使用SurfaceComposerClient提供的函数与SurfaceFlinger进行通信，如请求刷新屏幕、销毁表面、释放资源等。</li>
</ul>
<p>SurfaceComposerClient代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/libs/gui/SurfaceComposerClient.cpp</p>
<p>frameworks/native/include/gui/SurfaceComposerClient.h</p>

</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>

</div><h3 id="displayeventreceiver" class="heading-element"><span>DisplayEventReceiver</span>
 <a href="#displayeventreceiver" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>DisplayEventReceiver（显示事件接收器），用于接收来自底层硬件的显示事件。它是一个系统级别的组件，用于监听和处理与显示相关的事件，例如屏幕刷新、触摸事件等。开发者可以通过继承DisplayEventReceiver类，并实现onHotplug和onVsync方法来处理相应的事件。</p>
<p>DisplayEventReceiver代码位于：</p>

</div><h3 id="surfaceflinger" class="heading-element"><span>SurfaceFlinger</span>
 <a href="#surfaceflinger" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>SurfaceFlinger类是Android系统中的一个重要组件，它负责管理和渲染所有的图形界面。</p>
<p>SurfaceFlinger代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/service/surfaceflinger/SurfaeFlinger.h</p>
<p>frameworks/native/service/surfaceflinger/SurfaeFlinger.cpp</p>

<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-cpp" data-lang="cpp"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">class</span> <span class="nc">SurfaceFlinger</span> <span class="o">:</span> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">BnSurfaceComposer</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">PriorityDumper</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">public</span> <span class="n">ClientCache</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ErasedRecipient</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">IBinder</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">DeathRecipient</span><span class="p">,</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">private</span> <span class="n">HWC2</span><span class="o">::</span><span class="n">ComposerCallback</span> <span class="p">{}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>SurfaceFlinger方法：</p>
<p>void init() ANDROID_API：初始化</p>
<p>void run() ANDROID_API：运行</p>
<p>void initScheduler(const sp&lt;DisplayDevice&gt;&amp; display) REQUIRES(mStateLock)：初始化调度器。</p>
<p>void processDisplayChangesLocked() REQUIRES(mStateLock)：处理显示变化。</p>
<p>void processDisplayRemoved(const wp&lt;IBinder&gt;&amp; displayToken) REQUIRES(mStateLock)：处理显示删除。</p>
<p>void processDisplayChanged(const wp&lt;IBinder&gt;&amp; displayToken, const DisplayDeviceState&amp; currentState, const DisplayDeviceState&amp; drawingState) REQUIRES(mStateLock)：处理显示变化</p>
<p>bool latchBuffers()：负责将应用程序的图形缓冲区（buffer）与显示器进行关联，实现图像的显示。具体来说，它的主要功能是将应用程序的图形缓冲区复制到显示器的帧缓冲区（framebuffer）中。</p>
<p>void onLayerFirstRef(Layer*)：在创建一个新的图层时被调用。</p>
<p>void onLayerDestroyed(Layer*)：在图层消耗时被调用。</p>
<p>void onLayerUpdate()：在图层更新时被调用。</p>
<p>//HWC2::ComposerCallback:</p>
<p>void onComposerHalVsync(hal::HWDisplayId, int64_t timestamp, std::optional<a href="hal::VsyncPeriodNanos"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">hal::VsyncPeriodNanos</a>)：</p>
<p>void onComposerHalHotplug(hal::HWDisplayId, hal::Connection)：</p>
<p>void onComposerHalRefresh(hal::HWDisplayId)：</p>
<p>void onComposerHalVsyncPeriodTimingChanged(hal::HWDisplayId, const hal::VsyncPeriodChangeTimeline&amp;)：</p>
<p>void onComposerHalSeamlessPossible(hal::HWDisplayId) ：</p>
<p>void onComposerHalVsyncIdle(hal::HWDisplayId)：</p>
<p>//ICompositor overrides:</p>
<p>bool commit(nsecs_t frameTime, int64_t vsyncId, nsecs_t expectedVsyncTime) override：提交图层和显示的事务。</p>
<p>void composite(nsecs_t frameTime, int64_t vsyncId) override：用于将多个窗口的图像进行合成，主要负责对相关要进行上帧的layer进行，识别排序好，然后合成。</p>
<h3 id="client" class="heading-element"><span>Client</span>
 <a href="#client" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>在Surface中，Client类是客户端进程与服务端进程之间的一个桥梁，用于完成客户端进程与服务端进程之间的通信交互，Client实现了ISurfaceComposerClient接口，Client常见方法如下：</p>
<p>attachLayer：将一个Layer与Surface进行关联。</p>
<p>detachLayer：将一个Layer与Surface分离。</p>
<p>getLayerUser：获取指定Layer的用户。</p>
<p>createSurface：创建一个新的Surface。</p>
<p>clearLayerFrameStats：清除Layer的帧间统计信息。</p>
<p>getLayerFrameStats：获取指定Layer的帧间通信信息。</p>
<p>Client代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Client.h</p>
<p>frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Client.cpp</p>

</span></code></pre></td>

</div><h3 id="layer" class="heading-element"><span>Layer</span>
 <a href="#layer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>Layer是SurfaceFlinger进行合成的基本操作单元。Layer在应用请求创建Surface的时候在SurfaceFlinger内部创建，因此一个Surface对应一个Layer。Layer其实是一个FrameBuffer,每个FrameBuffer中有两个GraphicBuffer记作FrontBuffer和BackBuffer。SurfaceFlinger能够创建四种类型的Layer，BufferQueueLayer，BufferStateLayer，ColorLayer，ContainerLayer，最常用的就是BufferQueueLayer。</p>
<p>Layer代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Layer.h</p>
<p>frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/Layer.cpp</p>
<p>Layer的定义：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>

 <a href="#bufferqueuelayer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>BufferQueueLayer是一种基于缓冲队列的图层，它使用一个缓冲队列来存储多个图像数据。当应用程序更新图像时，BufferQueueLayer会将新的图像数据添加到缓冲队列的末尾，并在每一帧显示时使用队列中的下一个缓冲区。BufferQueueLayer适用于需要处理多个图像数据的场景，例如多个应用程序同时显示图像或需要实现双缓冲机制的应用程序。</p>
<p>BufferQueueLayer代码位于：</p>
<p>frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/BufferQueueLayer.h</p>
<p>frameworks/native/services/surfaceflinger/BufferQueueLayer.cpp</p>
